description_long: This is a modern outdoor bench featuring a series of horizontal wooden slats forming both the seat and the backrest, supported by a robust black metal frame. The frame curves seamlessly from the ground to the back, creating a continuous, angular support structure on each side. The wood slats are evenly spaced, providing both comfort and ventilation, while the metal frame adds durability and a contemporary aesthetic. The bench lacks armrests, giving it a minimalist and open appearance. Its design is both functional and stylish, suitable for parks, sidewalks, or urban plazas. The materials and construction suggest it is built to withstand outdoor conditions.
description: A modern bench with horizontal wooden slats and a continuous black metal frame, designed for outdoor urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the bench, the horizontal wooden slats, and the continuous black metal frame.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the angular, continuous metal frame and the profile of the wooden slats.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the bench, the alignment of the slats, and the supporting frame structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the angular frame and slat arrangement seen in view 1.
attribute_leg_design: continuous angular black metal frame supports
